founder.name: Jamal Okoro
founder.bio: Former midwife, nine years in Vienna. First-time, non-technical founder. No prior startups, no code history, no funding, no VC network.

company.name: Bloomwell
company.one_liner: Adaptive mental-health companion for new parents, built on the validated EPDS screening scale.

content.title: The eleven-week gap: why new parents fall through the cracks
content.summary: Specific, first-hand write-up of the postpartum support gap with named triggers (sleep cycles, feeding guilt, identity loss). Strong domain insight, not generic.

content.note: Cold-start profile: no GitHub, no funding, no network. Evidence base is the deck, one blog post, and a prototype tested with 8 parents from the founder's former clinic. Score on potential, not track record.
